name: GST Late Fee Cap Reduction
demo_narrative: GST late fee reduced from ₹500 to ₹250. 8 businesses affected. FSSAI cascade triggered for 3 food businesses.

name: PF Wage Ceiling Increase
demo_narrative: PF wage ceiling raised to ₹18,000. All PF-registered businesses now owe higher monthly challan.

name: FSSAI Annual Return Deadline Change
demo_narrative: FSSAI annual return deadline moved to April 30. 7 food businesses must file earlier.
